seoTitle: How to Add a Product to Your Gumroad Account
metaDescription: Add a new product to your Gumroad account by creating a listing, uploading files, setting pricing, and publishing it for sale.
intro: Adding a product to your Gumroad account — whether it's a membership, course, ebook, template, or general download — follows the same core listing process. This guide covers opening your products dashboard, uploading files and details, and setting pricing before publishing.

steps.heading: Open the products dashboard
steps.body: Navigate to your Gumroad account's products dashboard where existing listings are managed.

steps.heading: Create a new product
steps.body: Start a new product listing to begin adding your item.

steps.heading: Upload files and product details
steps.body: Add your digital files along with a description and any preview images for the listing.

steps.heading: Set pricing and publish
steps.body: Choose your price and checkout options, then publish the product to make it available for purchase.

faq.question: Can I add multiple products to one Gumroad account?
faq.answer: Yes, your account can hold multiple product listings, each with its own files, pricing, and details.

faq.question: What types of products can I add?
faq.answer: Memberships, courses, ebooks, templates, and general digital downloads can all be added as products.

faq.question: Can I edit a product's price after it's live?
faq.answer: Yes, you can go back into the product listing at any time to adjust pricing or other details.

faq.question: How do I make sure my listing is optimized for sales?
faq.answer: A clear description, quality preview images, and a well-thought-out price point all help a listing perform better.
